notes: Smoother, flicker-free navigation. The Today screen now waits until your progress has fully loaded before it paints, so the lesson button lands on the right label ("Start Day 8") and the ring shows its real value on the first frame — no more flashing a wrong state for a split second. Switching tabs is snappier too: the fade is shorter, so you no longer catch a glimpse of the previous tab before the new one appears.
